notes: Representative Commander deck fixtures used for legality, parser, and analysis tests. Each entry references a sibling .txt file containing a pasted-decklist style card list with explicit Commander, Mainboard, and optional Sideboard sections. Color identity, banlist intent, and power band are recorded to make legality and analysis assertions stable.

decks.name: Omnath Mono-Green Stompy
decks.intent: Legal mono-green casual ramp/stompy build. Uses no banned cards.

decks.name: Atraxa Superfriends Upgraded
decks.intent: Legal four-color superfriends upgraded build. Uses no banned cards.

decks.name: Krenko Goblin Tribal
decks.intent: Legal mono-red goblin tribal aggro build for parser and ownership tests.

decks.name: Atraxa With Banned Card
decks.intent: Intentionally illegal: includes Mana Crypt (banned in Commander) to exercise banlist regression checks.

decks.name: Krenko Singleton Violation
decks.intent: Intentionally illegal: contains 4 copies of Goblin Piledriver (non-basic, non-singleton-exempt) to exercise singleton checks.

decks.name: Krenko Off-Color
decks.intent: Intentionally illegal: mono-red commander but mainboard contains Counterspell (blue) to exercise color identity checks.
